title: Principal Plant Manager at Akzo Nobel India Asia Pacific Associates
company: Akzo Nobel India Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Principal Plant Manager at Akzo Nobel India Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Akzo Nobel India Asia Pacific Associates is actively seeking a talented and motivated Plant Manager to join our dynamic team in Faridabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Akzo Nobel India Asia Pacific Associates:
Akzo Nobel India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Akzo Nobel India Asia Pacific Associates!
